title: Drew Hasselback
content:
Communications Specialist
People.ContactEmail dhasselback@mccarthy.ca
Drew Hasselback is a specialist on the Communications team at McCarthy Tétrault, based in the firm's Toronto office.
With more than three decades of experience in financial journalism as a reporter, writer, editor, and content manager, Drew brings a deep understanding of the needs of journalists working to translate complex corporate and regulatory concepts into clear, accessible language.
He holds a law degree from Western University and was called to the Bar of Ontario in 1998. Prior to joining McCarthy Tétrault in October 2024, Drew held senior editorial roles at The Financial Post, where he served for many years as editor of the Legal Post, and at Global News, where he led the website’s copy editing team.
In addition to his law degree, Drew holds a BA (Hons) in political science and French from Western University, and a journalism degree from Toronto Metropolitan University. He speaks English, French, and German. Outside of work, he volunteers as a leader with Scouts Canada.
